best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-utente-001 title: user registration and login module: utente source pages: 2 preconditions: test data: - username: testuser - password: testpassword - email: test@example.com - admin: false - footprint_totale: "0 kg co2" - new password: newpassword - new email: newemail@example.com - new admin status: true - new footprint: "10 kg co2" - user is not registered in the database test steps: 1. user enters username, password, email, and sets admin status to false. 2. user submits the form to register. 3. application sends a request to the database to verify registration. 4. database responds with "not registered". 5. application sends the homepage to the user. 6. user logs out. 7. user attempts to log in with the same credentials. 8. application sends a request to the database to verify registration. 9. database responds with "registered". 10. application sends the homepage to the user. expected result: - user is successfully registered and logged in. - user can change their details and log out.

test case id: tc-produzione-001 title: production data modification module: produzione source pages: 2, 3 preconditions: user is logged in and has access to production data. test data: - id: 1 - utente: testuser - modello: model1 - footprint produzione: "5 kg co2" - footprint totale: "10 kg co2" - new footprint produzione: "7 kg co2" - new footprint totale: "12 kg co2" test steps: 1. user navigates to the production data modification page. 2. user selects the production entry with id 1. 3. user updates the footprint produzione to "7 kg co2". 4. user updates the footprint totale to "12 kg co2". 5. user saves the changes. 6. application sends a request to the database to update the data. 7. database confirms the update. 8. application sends a confirmation message to the user. expected result: - production data is updated successfully. - user receives a confirmation message.
